output.sparql:
PREFIX pr: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/reference/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT((xsd:float(?minutes) * 60 + xsd:float(?seconds)) * 1000 AS ?millis) WHERE {
  wd:Q5965 p:P1257 ?stmt .
  ?stmt ps:P1257 wd:Q1 ; ps:P3876 ?time ; pr:P805 ?race .
  ?race wdt:P31 wd:Q1182584 ; wdt:P131 wd:Q21835 ; wdt:P585 ?date .
  FILTER(YEAR(?date) IN(2015 , 2016))
  .
  BIND(STR(?time) AS ?timeStr)
  BIND(STRBEFORE(STRAFTER(?timeStr , "PT") , "M") AS ?minutes)
  BIND(STRBEFORE(STRAFTER(?timeStr , "M") , "S") AS ?seconds)
}
ORDER BY ASC(?millis)
LIMIT 1
OFFSET 1

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX pr: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/reference/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT((xsd:float(?minutes) * 60 + xsd:float(?seconds)) * 1000 AS ?millis) WHERE {
  wd:Q5965 p:P1257 ?stmt .
  ?stmt ps:P1257 wd:Q1 ; ps:P3876 ?time ; pr:P805 ?race .
  ?race wdt:P31 wd:Q1182584 ; wdt:P131 wd:Q21835 ; wdt:P585 ?date .
  FILTER(YEAR(?date) IN(2015 , 2016))
  .
  BIND(STR(?time) AS ?timeStr)
  BIND(STRBEFORE(STRAFTER(?timeStr , "PT") , "M") AS ?minutes)
  BIND(STRBEFORE(STRAFTER(?timeStr , "M") , "S") AS ?seconds)
}
ORDER BY ASC(?millis)
LIMIT 1
OFFSET 1
```

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX pr: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/reference/>

SELECT ( (xsd:float(?minutes) * 60 + xsd:float(?seconds)) * 1000 AS ?millis )
WHERE {
  wd:Q5965 p:P1257 ?statement.
  ?statement
    ps:P1257 wd:Q1 ;
    pq:P642 wd:Q7197 ;
    pr:P805 ?race ;
    ps:P3876 ?time.
  ?race wdt:P31 wd:Q1182584 ;
        wdt:P585 ?date.
  FILTER(YEAR(?date) IN (2015, 2016))
  BIND(STR(?time) AS ?timeStr)
  BIND(STRBEFORE(STRAFTER(?timeStr, "PT"), "M") AS ?minutes)
  BIND(STRBEFORE(STRAFTER(STRAFTER(?timeStr, "PT"), "M"), "S") AS ?seconds)
}
ORDER BY ASC(?millis)
LIMIT 1
OFFSET 1
